scope: no-training qualification of one compact pairwise reciprocal-torus score residual after coordinate-only H1a underfit; no checkpoint loading, generation, H1b-H6, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT

mechanism.new_residual: complete unordered node pairs with signed symmetric pair coefficients and a smooth projective physical reciprocal ball
mechanism.pair_coefficient: b_ijc=b_jic from shared scalar node states; unlike the archived a_ic*a_jc factorization it is not constrained to a node-amplitude Gram form
mechanism.projective_modes: k and -k are evaluated once with exact duplicate correction
mechanism.complexity: O(P*C + K*C + P*K*C), P=N*(N-1)/2, vectorized over padded pairs and reciprocal modes with N<=20
mechanism.output: antisymmetric pair contributions in Cartesian covector coordinates, hence exact graphwise zero mean

decision_rule.pass: freeze a separately versioned one-seed one-pass coordinate-pretraining experiment with the qualified residual
decision_rule.fail: do not train it; reject the operator and return to H1a representation analysis
decision_rule.boundary: Qualification cannot revive the archived reciprocal implementation or authorize extra steps, joint initialization, H1b, tensor conditioning or later Gates.
